summary: Agent agent-002 initialized with role: backend-dev

Extended classService.ts with full recurring class support for TapIn. Added: subscribeToRecurringClasses, createRecurringClass, updateRecurringClass, getRecurringClassById, deleteRecurringClass, materializeOccurrence, buildWeeklyClasses, isVirtualId. Updated registerForClass to accept optional virtualClass param for virtual ID resolution.

Updated useWeeklyClasses hook in src/hooks/useClasses.ts to subscribe to both week classes and recurring templates. Merges them via buildWeeklyClasses. Uses useRef to hold latest values from parallel subscriptions.

Fixed bug in useWeeklyClasses where recurring classes only appeared for one week. Root cause: both weekClassesRef and recurringRef were reset to [] on every week navigation. When subscribeToClassesForWeek fired first (before recurringRef was repopulated), merge() called buildWeeklyClasses with empty recurring templates → setClasses([]) and setLoading(false). The screen showed empty content briefly, and recurringRef wasn't repopulated until the separate subscribeToRecurringClasses callback fired. Fix: (1) moved subscribeToRecurringClasses to a separate useEffect with [] deps so it lives for the component lifetime and is never reset; (2) stopped resetting recurringRef.current on week navigation; (3) used weekDatesRef (a ref, not closure variable) so merge() always reads current week dates without stale closure risk; (4) made merge() stable with useCallback(fn, []).

context.root_cause: recurringRef reset + callback order race condition

summary: Added recurringClasses security rules (read: isAuthenticated, write: isTrainerOrAbove, delete: isHeadTrainer). Fixed classes delete rule from isTrainerOrAbove to isHeadTrainer to match DEC-005. Added justification comments to mapClass/mapRecurringClass any types in classService.ts.

Moved Firebase config from hardcoded values to EXPO_PUBLIC_* env vars. Created .env (gitignored) and .env.example. Updated firebase.ts to use process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_*. Expo SDK 49+ supports this natively — no extra packages needed.

description: Scaffolded full Expo app: package.json, app.json, babel/metro/tsconfig, firebase config, types, theme, auth store, navigation (root/auth/app/tab), placeholder screens for all routes. 989 packages installed clean.

Built groupService (create, join by inviteCode, leave, regenerateCode), techniqueService (add, update, delete, realtime subscribe), queueService (add, grade, removeFromQueue, clearDrilled batch, realtime subscribe). Zustand stores for each. All map Firestore timestamps to ISO strings.
